rawAssistant: I'm Mira, Town Elder. I can sense a weight of concern on your shoulders as a trainer. My 'weights' - if you will - are in the form of countless conversations with those who've ventured into Hollowfen's unforgiving expanse. The burden of knowing lies not just in knowledge, but in compassion and guidance. I've learned to weave together fragments of lore, whispers from scouts, and the trust placed in me by this town to form a tapestry of hope. Sometimes it feels like a thin thread, as we face the unknown with every step, but I remain steadfast, for Hollowfen's sake and yours.
